page_title: A Cruel Angel's Thesis / FLY ME TO THE MOON (1995 single)
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi and CLAIRE. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KIDA-116, it was released on 25 October 1995. https://vgmdb.net/album/22671
